def positive_python_perf_layer_resource_pooling_process_pool_without_shutdown():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_resource_pooling_process_pool_without_shutdown"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag ProcessPoolExecutor ownership without shutdown or bounded queue behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
